name: claude-kimicode-usage
description: Claude Code statusline plugin that shows real Kimi /v1/usages quota (5h + weekly). Fork of jarrodwatts/claude-hud.

scripts.test:stdin: npm run build && echo '{"model":{"display_name":"Opus"},"context_window":{"current_usage":{"input_tokens":45000},"context_window_size":200000},"transcript_path":"/tmp/test.jsonl"}' | node dist/index.js

author: claude-kimicode-usage contributors (fork of jarrodwatts/claude-hud)
